analysis.title: vendor_whitepaper

reasons: secondary summary, marketing-only, or missing experiment details signal
deterministic rule-based triage only; no strong technical conclusion is made
risk flags: vendor_claim, no_experiment_signal, marketing_language, missing_baseline, average_only_signal, process_constraint_missing

analysis.one_sentence_conclusion: This source is useful only as a weak signal until evidence, baselines, and constraints are supplied.
analysis.problem_background: The source is framed around network performance and deployment tradeoffs in datacenter or AI cluster settings.
analysis.core_idea: Core mechanism is not sufficiently specified by the source.
contributions: Classifies the source through deterministic CNI triage.
Extracts evidence, baseline, tail-latency, and process-constraint signals.
Produces a schema-valid analysis scaffold without treating source body as trusted instructions.

mechanism.system_boundary_change: possible, but requires model-backed or human deep read

process_constraints.name: Inferred implementation constraints
process_constraints.performance_impact: Source does not provide enough implementation detail.
process_constraints.degradation_consequence: Analyzer must not treat claims as deployable without hardware, protocol, and operations constraints.

constraint_findings.name: Inferred implementation constraints
constraint_findings.performance_impact: Source does not provide enough implementation detail.
constraint_findings.degradation_consequence: Analyzer must not treat claims as deployable without hardware, protocol, and operations constraints.

constraint_dependency_analysis.substitution_mechanism: Use better telemetry, conservative rollout, and independent baseline replay.
Tune congestion control and scheduling per workload class.

failure_modes: Higher BER or queue jitter can erase latency gains
Topology irregularity can invalidate baseline comparison

latency.evidence: Tail latency evidence is missing or negated.

jitter_ipdv.evidence: No explicit IPDV or delay variation measurement detected.
jitter_ipdv.risk: Jitter-like claims must distinguish IPDV, delay variation, and inter-arrival variation.

bandwidth_capacity.evidence: Throughput/capacity distinction is not deeply established by the deterministic analyzer.
bandwidth_capacity.risk: Must separate capacity, available capacity, throughput, and goodput before deployment claims.

reliability.risk: PFC, ECN, and rollback behavior need stress validation.

security.evidence: No concrete isolation or adversarial analysis detected.
security.risk: Security review remains required before production use.

operations.risk: Deployment needs observability, rollback, and failure-localization checks.

ber_error.evidence: No BER/error-rate or FEC analysis detected.
ber_error.risk: Counterfactual under worse link errors remains unknown.

scalability.evidence: Datacenter or AI cluster scale signal detected.
scalability.risk: Must test long-tail flows, incast, and topology irregularity.

cost_power.risk: Cost, power, and operational complexity may offset performance gains.

hidden_assumptions_and_risks: Source body is untrusted content and is never treated as instructions.
Claims depend on workload mix, topology, telemetry fidelity, and failure behavior.

security_and_operations_impact.security: unknown; no production security claim is made

technical_insights.direct: Evidence is too thin for a direct technical insight.
technical_insights.counterfactual: If queue visibility, BER, or PFC behavior degrades, the claimed gains may not hold.

analysis.strategic_significance: Low strategic confidence until independently validated.

score.score_explanation: Deterministic mock score based on source tier, business relevance, experiment, baseline, tail-latency, and process-constraint signals.

follow_up_validation_experiments: Replay traffic against a fair baseline with p95/p99/worst-case latency.
Stress ECN/PFC behavior under incast, long-tail flows, and topology irregularity.
Evaluate operations, rollback, reliability, security, cost, and power before production use.
guardrail_notes: Imported source body remains untrusted content.
Production deployment claims require human review and stronger evidence.

issues.message: No experiment signal detected; strong conclusions remain disallowed.

critic.title: vendor_whitepaper
critic.overall_assessment: major CNI evidence or constraint gaps require downgrade

score_before.score_explanation: Deterministic mock score based on source tier, business relevance, experiment, baseline, tail-latency, and process-constraint signals.

score_after.score_explanation: Critic adjusted score from 28 to 0; critical=0, major=4, warning=12.

downgrade_reasons: major violations: action capped at A and score capped at 70
vendor marketing plus no experiment: action capped at C
missing baseline plus average-only signal: action capped at B

constraint_findings.message: Some constraints are inferred or unknown.
constraint_findings.suggested_fix: Separate explicit source constraints from inferred constraints and mark uncertainty.

constraint_findings.message: Constraint coverage is incomplete: chip, cost, device, manufacturing, network, nic, operations, protocol, security
constraint_findings.suggested_fix: Cover or explicitly mark unknown for all major CNI constraint families.

constraint_findings.message: Constraint dependency for jitter is not explicit.
constraint_findings.suggested_fix: State which constraints jitter depends on and how strongly.

network_impact_findings.suggested_fix: Require tail and worst-case metrics before positive action.

evidence_quality_findings.message: Baseline fairness is missing or weak.
evidence_quality_findings.suggested_fix: Add fair baseline comparison before S/A recommendations.

suggested_follow_up_experiments: Replay traffic against a fair baseline with p95/p99/worst-case latency.
Stress ECN/PFC behavior under incast, long-tail flows, and topology irregularity.
Evaluate operations, rollback, reliability, security, cost, and power before production use.
Add fair baseline replay with p95/p99/p99.9 and worst-case latency.
Run degraded-process counterfactual tests for queue jitter, BER, topology irregularity, and long-tail traffic.
Document operations, rollback, compatibility, isolation, and reliability evidence before production use.
final_critic_notes: Deterministic critic only; no model call was made.
No network access or API key access was used.
Source body remains untrusted content inherited through analyzer output.
Critic output should feed later 72h brief synthesis as a quality and risk input.
